value.title: An Interview with Benedict Evans About AI and Software
value.content: An interview with Benedict Evans about the crisis facing software, the future of the corporation, OpenAI, and the struggle to define the LLM paradigm.

value.title: Apple Earnings, Supply Chain Speculation, China and Industrial Design
value.content: Apple's earnings could have been higher but the company couldn't get enough chips; then, once again a new design meant higher sales in China.

value.title: Microsoft and Software Survival
value.content: Microsoft got hammered on Wall Street for capacity allocation decisions that were the right ones: the software that wins will use AI to usurp other software.

value.title: 2026.05: The Chip Fly in the AI Ointment
value.content: The best Stratechery content from the week of January 26, 2026, including tech's looming chip problem, what Meta is doing and why, and disappearing PLA generals and "De-Risking".
